error.SANDBOX-ERR-1.other: Sandbox name exceeds maximum length (253 characters).

error.SANDBOX-ERR-2.other: Sandbox name contains uppercase letters (only lowercase allowed).

error.SANDBOX-ERR-3.other: Sandbox name has invalid characters or format (only a-z, 0-9, -, . allowed; cannot start/end with -/. or have consecutive -/. ).
